Unload Power Top.name: Unload Power Top
Unload Power Top.description: Deal 70% damage to a small area of enemies, with a 75% chance to apply an attack reduction effect for two turns.

Toxic Gas Top.name: Toxic Gas Top
Toxic Gas Top.description: Deal 50% damage to nearby enemies and apply 1 Poisoned effect for 2 turns (The Poisoned effect can deal up to 20000 damage).

Adv Nest Core Top.name: Adv Nest Core Top
Adv Nest Core Top.description: Deal 56% damage to a small area of enemies and reduce their mobility by 8%.
